Package org.gdal.osr

Interface osrConstants

All Known Implementing Classes:
osr
public interface osrConstants

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    OAMS_AUTHORITY_COMPLIANT
     
    static final int
    OAMS_CUSTOM
     
    static final int
    OAMS_TRADITIONAL_GIS_ORDER
     
    static final int
    OAO_Down
     
    static final int
    OAO_East
     
    static final int
    OAO_North
     
    static final int
    OAO_Other
     
    static final int
    OAO_South
     
    static final int
    OAO_Up
     
    static final int
    OAO_West
     
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM
    Class of error codes related to transformation on a specific coordinate.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_GRID_AT_NODATA
    Point to transform falls in a grid cell that evaluates to nodata.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_INVALID_COORD
    Invalid input coordinate. e.g a latitude > 90 deg.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_NO_OPERATION
    No operation found, e.g if no match the required accuracy, or if ballpark transformations were asked to not be used and they would be only such candidate.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_OUTSIDE_GRID
    Point to transform falls outside grid/subgrid/TIN.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_OUTSIDE_PROJECTION_DOMAIN
    Coordinate is outside of the projection domain. e.g approximate mercator with \|longitude - lon_0\| > 90 deg, or iterative convergence method failed.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP
    Class of error codes typically related to coordinate operation initialization, typically when creating a PJ* object from a PROJ string.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_FILE_NOT_FOUND_OR_INVALID
    File not found or with invalid content (particular case of PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_ILLEGAL_ARG_VALUE)
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_ILLEGAL_ARG_VALUE
    One of the operation parameter has an illegal value.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_MISSING_ARG
    Missing required operation parameter
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_MUTUALLY_EXCLUSIVE_ARGS
    Mutually exclusive arguments.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_WRONG_SYNTAX
    Invalid pipeline structure, missing +proj argument, etc.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_OTHER
    Class of error codes that do not fit into one of the above class.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_OTHER_API_MISUSE
    Error related to a misuse of PROJ API.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_OTHER_NETWORK_ERROR
    Failure when accessing a network resource.
    static final int
    PROJ_ERR_OTHER_NO_INVERSE_OP
    No inverse method available.
    static final String

    • OAMS_CUSTOM

      static final int OAMS_CUSTOM
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP

      static final int PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP
      Class of error codes typically related to coordinate operation initialization, typically when creating a PJ* object from a PROJ string. Some of them can also be emitted during coordinate transformation, like PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_FILE_NOT_FOUND_OR_INVALID in case the resource loading is deferred until it is really needed.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_WRONG_SYNTAX

      static final int PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_WRONG_SYNTAX
      Invalid pipeline structure, missing +proj argument, etc.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_MISSING_ARG

      static final int PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_MISSING_ARG
      Missing required operation parameter
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_ILLEGAL_ARG_VALUE

      static final int PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_ILLEGAL_ARG_VALUE
      One of the operation parameter has an illegal value.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_MUTUALLY_EXCLUSIVE_ARGS

      static final int PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_MUTUALLY_EXCLUSIVE_ARGS
      Mutually exclusive arguments.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_FILE_NOT_FOUND_OR_INVALID

      static final int PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_FILE_NOT_FOUND_OR_INVALID
      File not found or with invalid content (particular case of PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_ILLEGAL_ARG_VALUE)
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM

      static final int PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM
      Class of error codes related to transformation on a specific coordinate.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_INVALID_COORD

      static final int PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_INVALID_COORD
      Invalid input coordinate. e.g a latitude > 90 deg.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_OUTSIDE_PROJECTION_DOMAIN

      static final int PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_OUTSIDE_PROJECTION_DOMAIN
      Coordinate is outside of the projection domain. e.g approximate mercator with \|longitude - lon_0\| > 90 deg, or iterative convergence method failed.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_NO_OPERATION

      static final int PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_NO_OPERATION
      No operation found, e.g if no match the required accuracy, or if ballpark transformations were asked to not be used and they would be only such candidate.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_OUTSIDE_GRID

      static final int PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_OUTSIDE_GRID
      Point to transform falls outside grid/subgrid/TIN.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_GRID_AT_NODATA

      static final int PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_GRID_AT_NODATA
      Point to transform falls in a grid cell that evaluates to nodata.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_OTHER

      static final int PROJ_ERR_OTHER
      Class of error codes that do not fit into one of the above class.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_OTHER_API_MISUSE

      static final int PROJ_ERR_OTHER_API_MISUSE
      Error related to a misuse of PROJ API.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_OTHER_NO_INVERSE_OP

      static final int PROJ_ERR_OTHER_NO_INVERSE_OP
      No inverse method available.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROJ_ERR_OTHER_NETWORK_ERROR

      static final int PROJ_ERR_OTHER_NETWORK_ERROR
      Failure when accessing a network resource.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
